{{Quote|Gorm was never without his dimwitted little companion, Chester.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="Luke Skywalker: Detective">{{Tales|20|Luke Skywalker: Detective}}</ref>}}
'''Chester''' was the short [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] sidekick to [[Gorm Maldorf]]. Chester accidentally [[Death/Legends|killed]] him by strangling him with wire in [[the Cage]], and tried to blame Gorm's rival, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].

{{Char-stub}}
